section: # -- client_spending.csv: Core spending, mortgage/housing costs, rent, and travel/extra expenses.

label: annual_spending_base_year
notes: Base year; excludes taxes and mortgage

label: core_spending_growth_mode
notes: cpi | manual_override; Choose whether core spending increases with general CPI or a manual spending-specific rate.

label: core_spending_manual_growth_rate
notes: Annual core-spending increase used only when core_spending_growth_mode is manual_override.

label: last_payment_year
notes: Model stops mortgage in this year

label: annual_real_estate_taxes
notes: Annual real-estate/property tax cash-flow amount; shown with Mortgage and RE Tax instead of core spending.

label: real_estate_tax_annual_adjustment_pct
notes: Annual percentage adjustment applied to real-estate/property taxes in the cash-flow forecast.

label: monthly_rent_post_sale
notes: Active from home_sale_year; inflated with CPI; hidden from UI/workbook when zero

label: extra_1_amount
